svg.title: AI API Security Framework v2 — Architecture map
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing providers, agents, core, and CI/CD layers of the framework.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the LLM provider abstraction work?')
sendPrompt('How do I switch to Anthropic Claude?')
sendPrompt('How does the auth manager handle OAuth2?')
sendPrompt('How does the history diff engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does the OpenAPI parser work?')
sendPrompt('What does the HTTP executor do?')
sendPrompt('How does the API Understanding Agent enrich endpoints?')
sendPrompt('What test categories does the Test Generation Agent create?')
sendPrompt('How does the Execution Agent run requests?')
sendPrompt('What does the Validation Agent check?')
sendPrompt('How does the Security Agent score confidence?')
sendPrompt('What does the Reporting Agent output?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline work?')
g.text: Push · PR · Nightly schedule · PR comment · Fail on new critical findings

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I run the CLI?')
sendPrompt('How do I use the FastAPI web server?')
sendPrompt('What tests are in the test suite?')
